import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut is_pal = true
  mut i = 0
  while i < n / 2
    let a = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      -1
    end
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, n - 1 - i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      -2
    end
    if a != b
      is_pal = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if is_pal
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
